title: limniris fernaldii
intro: Limniris fernaldii, also known as Lycopodiella fernaldii, is a species of club moss that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Limniris fernaldii include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its antimicrobial and antifungal properties. In herbal preparations, Limniris fernaldii is typically dried and used in teas, tinctures, or infused oils to harness its medicinal properties.
